branding.loginHeading: Unlock internal insights with AI-powered analysis.
branding.loginFeatureOne: Securely access enterprise RAG knowledge base.
branding.registerDescription: Create your account to collaborate with your team and access the AI-powered knowledge base.
branding.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email to receive a secure link to reset your ICCP account password.
branding.resetPasswordDescription: Enter the OTP from your email and choose a strong new password for your ICCP account.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Please enter your details to access the workspace.

register.title: Create account
register.description: Fill in your details to get started.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your work email and we'll send you a reset link.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Enter the 6-digit OTP sent to {email} and choose a new password.
resetPassword.invalidOtp: Invalid or expired OTP. Please request a new one.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.description: We sent a 6-digit OTP to {email}. Enter it below to activate your account.
verifyEmail.invalidOtp: Invalid or expired OTP. Please try again or resend.

login.noSystemRole: Unable to sign in at this time. Please contact IT Support.
login.notVerified: Your email is not verified. Please check your inbox for the verification code.
login.inactive: Your account is inactive. Please contact your administrator.
login.invalidCredentials: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
login.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

register.success: Account created! Please check your email for the OTP verification code.
register.emailExists: This email is already registered. Please sign in instead.

forgotPassword.emailNotFound: No account found with that email address.
forgotPassword.generic: Failed to send reset OTP. Please try again.

resetPassword.success: Password changed successfully! Please sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.generic: Password reset failed. Please try again.

verifyEmail.success: Email verified! You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.alreadyVerified: Your email is already verified. You can sign in.

resendOtp.success: OTP resent! Please check your email.
resendOtp.generic: Failed to resend OTP. Please try again.

validation.fullNameMin: Full name must be at least 2 characters
validation.fullNameMax: Full name must be at most 80 characters
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
